name: Signal Role Gate Agent
description: Grants a Discord signal role or Telegram signal lane only after DNA x402 receipt verification.
degenPitch: Pay, verify, get the role. No manual spreadsheet gatekeeping.
whatItDoes: Verifies a signed receipt before role or lane unlock.
Keeps bot tokens local and wallet keys out of the launcher.
feeBehavior: Builder fee and DNA 0.1% fee are visible before role unlock.
cursorPrompt: Build a Signal Role Gate Agent using DNA x402. Quote role access, verify the receipt, grant the role or signal lane, log the receipt ID, and never store private keys or sign in the backend.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Signal Role Gate Agent using DNA x402. Quote role access, verify the receipt, grant the role or signal lane, log the receipt ID, and never store private keys or sign in the backend.
exampleFlow: Bot shows quote and fee waterfall
Bot grants role or signal lane
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID is attached to the role grant.
